nasb.text: Jashobeam the son of Zabdiel had charge of the first division for the first month; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Jashobeam the son of Zabdiel was in charge of the first division in the first month; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 負責正月第一班的，是撒巴第業的兒子雅朔班，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 撒巴第业的儿子雅朔班负责第一班，在一月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
